issues.title: 11 consecutive encounters with HP > 90% (floors 1-4)
issues.description: 11 encounters in a row where player HP remained above 72 (90% of 80 max): F1E0, F1E1, F1E2, F2E0, F2E1, F2E2, F3E0, F3E1, F3E2, F4E0, F4E1. HP values: 80, 80, 80, 80, 80, 78, 78, 78, 73, 73, 73. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
